/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Werror=format-security -Wextra -Winvalid-pch -fexceptions -Wall -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fomit-frame-pointer -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/arranger.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmuse_arranger.so -o libmuse_arranger.so CMakeFiles/arranger.dir/arranger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arranger.dir/arrangerview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arranger.dir/pcanvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arranger.dir/structure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arranger.dir/tlist.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arranger.dir/moc_arranger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arranger.dir/moc_arrangerview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arranger.dir/moc_pcanvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arranger.dir/moc_tlist.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/muse-4.2/modules /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a ../mixer/libmuse_mixer.so ../widgets/libmuse_widgets.so /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libQt5Xml.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Svg.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.19
